row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a straight road with slight lane adjustments.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: A white truck is stationary or moving slowly on the right side; pedestrians are visible near building entrances.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with modern buildings, paved roads, and clear lane markings. A white box truck is parked or stopped on the right side of the road. Pedestrians are visible near building entrances on both sides.
semantic.visibility_notes: All objects are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp detail. No occlusions obscure key elements.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward camera motion consistent with vehicle travel. Objects maintain stable positions relative to each other over time.
logical.object_continuity: Truck remains stationary throughout frames. Pedestrians show minimal movement, consistent with standing or slow walking.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and building facades remain structurally consistent without warping or discontinuities.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the lane.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. Truck is stationary off-lane; pedestrians are not entering roadway. Scene suggests low-risk driving environment.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street scene with buildings and road. White truck and pedestrians are present but appear slightly distorted or less defined compared to Row 1.
semantic.visibility_notes: Objects retain general form but exhibit reduced clarity. Some details like text on truck or pedestrian clothing are indistinct or altered.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Camera motion appears smooth but may have minor jitter or drift. Object transitions are generally continuous but lack fine-grained stability.
logical.object_continuity: Truck and pedestrians persist across frames but show subtle positional shifts or morphing artifacts not seen in real footage.
logical.structure_continuity: Building lines and road boundaries occasionally warp or flicker, especially at frame edges or under perspective change.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle appears to continue forward, though trajectory may be slightly unstable due to generation artifacts.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability due to object distortion and structural instability may impair downstream decision-making. No overt hazard, but confidence in perception is lower than Row 1.

preserved_elements: General layout of road and buildings
Presence of white truck and pedestrians
missing_or_weakened_elements: Detail fidelity on vehicles and people
newly_introduced_elements: Minor ghosting or blending artifacts around object boundaries

artifacts_or_instabilities: Subtle positional drift between consecutive frames
